programme.title: Canada: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary following the animals of the epic wilderness through the four seasons. The story begins in autumn, which sees a miraculous transformation as the forests turn from vibrant green to gold and red - but as the days grow shorter and colder, many of Canada's animals are in a race against time to make what they can of the remaining food. Black bears fatten up and prepare for hibernation, birds fly south and beavers daub the walls of their lodge with mud for extra insulation(n)

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions(n)

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: In the final episode of the current series, Ben meets Dan, a photographer living off the land in the wilds of Oregon, who relies on catching fish and harvesting wild weeds to provide himself with food, and has built his own Native American-inspired sweat lodge. Dan reveals how his childhood inspired his unusual lifestyle, and takes Ben on a journey deep into the surrounding mountain ranges. However, he also shares his fears of an uncertain future, and how he may be forced to leave the meadow he calls home(n)

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: The longest-serving inmate in Western Massachusetts Regional Women's Correctional Centre faces another 11 years in prison for manslaughter, and struggles to come to terms with what she has done. A stripper convicted of ID fraud who gave birth in prison tries to turn her life around with a training programme, and a violent prisoner is being moved out of segregation and into a shared tank with seven others(n)

programme.title: Murdered by My Daughter
programme.desc: Documentary examining the events surrounding the murders in April 2016 of Elizabeth and Katie Edwards by 14-year-olds Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham, Britain's youngest double killers. The officer in charge of the case gives an insight into the investigation, including the recording of the interview in which Kim explaining why she killed her mother and sister, and one in which her boyfriend detailed his involvement in the crime(n)

programme.title: A Thousand Words (2012)
programme.desc: A spiritual guru decides to teach his lying literary agent a lesson for his dishonesty, and places a curse on him. The spell means he can only speak another 1,000 words in his life - and when the words run out, he will die. The only way to break the enchantment is to put right all his past mistakes. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy and Kerry Washington(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett(n)

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black(n)

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada (2006)
programme.desc: A woman with dreams of becoming a journalist takes a job as assistant to the editor of a prestigious fashion magazine - a position that should guarantee a bright future if she succeeds. Unfortunately, she has just signed up to work for the boss from hell, whose cruel personality and outrageous demands make her life a nightmare. Comedy drama, with Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt(n)

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch(n)

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman(n)

programme.title: The Other Woman (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to learn her boyfriend is actually married, but when she meets his wife, they quickly become friends. When they discover he has a third secret lover, they decide to join forces and teach him a lesson. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau(n)

programme.title: Menashe (2017)
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of New York's notoriously secretive Hasidic Jewish community, grocery store clerk Menashe struggles against tradition to keep custody of his only son after his wife passes away. Drama, starring Menashe Lustig. In Yiddish(n)

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut(n)

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma (1957)
programme.desc: A farmer in need of money agrees to guard a notorious outlaw until the train arrives to transport him to jail. Meanwhile, the pair are holed up in a hotel, where his prisoner plays mind games with him - and the villain's cohorts are waiting outside ready to engineer an escape. Western adapted from a novel by Elmore Leonard, with Van Heflin, Glenn Ford, Felicia Farr and Leora Dana(n)

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen(n)

programme.title: The 300 Spartans (1962)
programme.desc: The ruler of the Persian empire vows to expand his realm by conquering Greece. The king of Sparta steps forward to defend his homeland and the other kingdoms of Greece, but when he is betrayed by a political council, he finds himself without an army and must fend off the vast invading army with a mere 300 warriors. Historical drama, starring Richard Egan, Ralph Richardson and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley(n)

programme.title: An Elephant Sitting Still (2018)
programme.desc: Four city-dwellers find their lives intersect during a complicated day. Drama, starring Yu Zhang and Yuchang Peng. In Mandarin(n)

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June (1956)

As the two men prepare for the battle to come, they both reminisce about their love for the same woman. Second World War drama, starring Robert Taylor, Richard Todd, Dana Wynter and Edmond O'Brien(n)

When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone(n)

However, what they discover during their search forces them to question everything they believe. Biblical drama, starring Joseph Fiennes and Tom Felton(n)

A British soldier deployed to Belfast in 1971, almost immediately finds himself caught up in a riot. In the aftermath, he becomes separated from the rest of his unit. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself(n)

programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars(n)

programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Mary's bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on(n)

programme.desc: Barry accidentally records over one of Beverly's prized family videotapes - her treasured keepsake from his fifth birthday party. Meanwhile, Adam and Murray build a robot together, but the project comes between them when they experience creative differences(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: in Cardiff, DJ Trishna hopes her cooking will be even better than her rapping, as she hosts a hip-hop themed night in a bid to scoop the £1000 prize. However, when Yuno shakes his booty on the dance floor, opera-loving Nick is unimpressed and flirty Michelle lets her hands do the talking(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the second day of the competition in Cardiff and Nick is planning to bring some refinement and fine dining to the week's proceedings. However, fastidious Nick really has set himself a mountain to climb with a massive tasting menu(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Holland Hall Hotel in Upholland, Lancashire, where two of the guests are less than impressed when the breakfast table is laid with steak knives(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Railway Inn near Hull in East Yorkshire, where young couple Lydia Perkins and Luke Mainprize feel the pressure at breakfast time(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Driftwood B&B in Weymouth, where guest Lygia prepares to party when she spies the host's disco balls(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Bull Hotel in Wrotham, Kent, where owner Lygia Fontanella-Deadman prides herself on a luxury stay. But a surprise leads to criticism from one couple(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Genice and Cathy want Lydia and Luke to shed some light on the wardrobe situation(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of some of the most extraordinary weather events of 2019, including an avalanche in Snowdonia and the Toddbrook Reservoir incident in Derbyshire, which saw parts of nearby Whaley Bridge evacuated after flooding caused damage to the dam and it almost collapsed. Cameras also capture the sheer horror of being swept overboard by a monster wave in the middle of the night(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Cameras follow the paramedic teams of West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a crew treating a man found collapsed in his garden in Birmingham(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody

Cameras follow the twists and turns of the investigation as detectives try to uncover what really happened to him(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, 32, is brought to resus with a head injury after having an epileptic seizure, and he is sent for an urgent CT scan to assess the damage to his brain. Anastasia, 80, comes to urgent care with a pain in her leg and while she is sent for an X-ray to rule out a blood clot, she shares the story of her arrival to study in England from Nigeria, only for civil war to break out back home. Porter Chris, who's been part of the A&E department for 25 years, shares his insights into the job as he goes about his day(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: The harrowing events of one of the deadliest shootings in US history, when a gunman opened fire at Pulse nightclub in Orlando, killing 49 people and wounding 53(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Cameras follow the paramedic teams of West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a crew treating a man found collapsed in his garden in Birmingham(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help a Brisbane couple, with Ryan having enough of the constant maintenance required by their property(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

However, dust behind bath taps, a lack of coat-hangers and a breakfast that does not meet expectations take the shine off their stay(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Another pair are shocked to discover there is no view of the sea from their window, but things liven up when the guests go bowling and attend a surprise karaoke party(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Kalpana and Joseph's four-star townhouse in Blackpool, the Address. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers try to work out why male red panda Jung is losing weight, with a full medical examination scheduled after a special diet fails to solve the problem. West African mandrill JC is being challenged for his dominant position by his sons Ludo and Jareth and, while JC is taken for some health checks, Ludo gets 'over-friendly' with his dad's girlfriend. Tempers start to fray among Chester Zoo's Humboldt penguin colony during the annual moult - can youngsters Frazzle and Munch avoid being picked on by the grown-ups?(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Real-estate expert Andrew Winter and interior-design guru Neale Whitaker meet Queensland couple Damien and Olivia, who live in a home with a stunning view but rotten interior(n)

Jonathan and Michael, who are struggling to turn their magnificent French castle into a money-making venture, explore some of their chateau's caves in the hope of finding a buried fortune. She's originally from Sri Lanka and has chosen the Costa del Sol as her perfect spot because the beaches remind her of home. She's brought her best friend Shanez along to help, so Jasmine Harman shows them five apartments in and around Estepona for her £80,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Chambers from Redditch, Worcestershire, started their family young, but now their four children have grown up, they've decided to recapture their youth and buy a place in Spain where they can enjoy time in the sun - just the two of them. For their budget of £45,000 Laura Hamilton shows them five apartments in and around the town of Torrevieja, but will any of them be their perfect place?(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government(n)

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the story of the D-Day landings in June 1944, when the Allies launched the biggest ever amphibious invasion on the beaches of Normandy. Although both sides suffered heavy casualties, it proved to be the turning point in the war against Germany(n)

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu(n)

programme.title: Farage: The Man Who Made Brexit
programme.desc: Filmed over five months, this documentary explores the world of the British politician Nigel Farage as he attempts to build on his historic success in May 2019's European elections. This documentary captures the inside story of Farage's doomed attempt to persuade Boris Johnson to join a Leavers' Alliance with him, and also charts Farage's influence in changing British politics in the wake of the 2016 EU referendum. With racism returning to haunt the party and plummeting poll ratings, is December 2019's general election the event that finally persuades Farage that the UK will never buy what he is selling? Or can he claim victory with a brand-new right-leaning Tory government that supports much of what he stands for?(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A look at the night shift in a busy A&E department. A woman with a severe form of autism is brought in, having suffered an injury to one of her fingers. While she is treated, her sister shares stories of their childhood and the challenges their family have faced. An 82-year-old patient has difficulty breathing, and doctors suspect he has developed life-threatening sepsis and need to act fast to try to halt the spread of infection(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 10 remaining recruits are sent on the run from a military-trained hunter force, and stalked across the punishing Scottish Highlands during the Escape and Evasion phase. Those who make it through will face the most psychologically demanding phase of selection, Interrogation, where they are captured and questioned by a specialist team of military interrogators. With limited sleep and rations, the final stages of selection are designed to grind down recruits(n)

programme.title: Meet the Drug Lords: Inside the Real Narcos
programme.desc: Former Special Forces soldier Jason Fox continues his investigation into the South American drug cartels in Colombia, where the global narcotics industry began. He visits Buenaventura, a port area through which an estimated quarter of the world's cocaine passes. He learns about new methods of smuggling devised by the cartels, and meets Popeye, close friend and chief assassin for Pablo Escobar(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The host takes on a classic 1930s terraced home with a kitchen that's so tiny the fridge and oven have to live in another room. The two mismatched fireplaces are causing marital strife, with one of the couple loving the original 1930s one, and the other favouring the Victorian reproduction. Only one fireplace can stay in George's new art deco-inspired scheme. Plus, he revisits a Victorian home where George previously helped renovate the bottom two floors(n)

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken and Helen Lawal oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Teaching assistants Sheila and Syrika have a week to trim down ahead of their end-of-term party, partners Greg and Nath go on six-week diets to slim down before Lincoln Pride and Becci and Cassie want to lose weight for a friend's wedding in three months. Xand asks if fizzy water can really make people gain weight and also goes on a keto diet(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four dinner-party hosts on the north Kent coast compete to win £1,000. Life coach Ross Duttson kicks off the challenge, hoping to impress with the minimum of effort, while doll-maker and folk singer Elizabeth Lee promises a night 'with a touch of the obscure' and treats her guests to tarot card readings. Nursery teacher Claire Baker hosts an evening of glitz and glam, and John Russell tries to use his fortunate position as the final host to pull off the perfect soiree, having spent the week quizzing the others on their cooking and ingredients(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Essex serve up food inspired by Ibiza, Zimbabwe and the great outdoors, along with a little entertainment, as they compete to prove they are hosts with the most(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of America's most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. Gina is heavily involved in the creation of every recipe for the cupcakes sold in her stores and is keen to ensure each franchise is consistent in meeting her perfectionist standards(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Horrified to learn he has unwittingly invested in a forged painting, Frasier considers his options - and decides to exact a suitable revenge on the dealers who sold it to him. Kelsey Grammer stars(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Having advised a caller to break up with his girlfriend, Frasier ends up dating her himself - and bends the rules of professional ethics to continue the relationship. Comedy, guest starring Amanda Donohoe(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: House-hunters Charlotte and Ben are looking to move their young family lock, stock and barrel to the Central American country of Costa Rica. programme.title: A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Only one fireplace can stay in George's new art deco-inspired scheme. Plus, he revisits a Victorian home where George previously helped renovate the bottom two floors(n)

programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic seizes a chance to exact revenge on an old rival who had him thrown out of college - even though his plan involves giving himself a painful migraine. A burns victim's unusual brain activity has the team baffled when tests turn up no likely cause. Waking the patient leaves him in agony, but provides House with valuable information. Starring Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market. English teacher Muhammad is suffering from serious financial difficulty as his tenant has refused to pay rent for more than four months - and to make matters worse, the tenant has been subletting rooms in his property. In north-west London, a bedsit fire exposes a negligent landlord, while in Cheshire, Carl is shocked to hear squatters are living in his property(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron and David's plans are scuppered when Lisa reveals she is pregnant. David is despondent, but Paul has an idea that might lift his spirits(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie is devastated when Colby ends things, and Ziggy acquires an ally at the track and is annoyed when Dean turns up(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The team tries to unravel the symptoms of a woman who suffered a seizure in the bath and almost drowned her four-week-old son. House realises Chase has asked to be reassigned, and Wilson tells his grumpy friend that Cuddy has asked him to dinner - prompting both men to wonder about the motives behind the invitation. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A girl who has developed unsettling hallucinations since surviving Hurricane Katrina is brought into the hospital by a man claiming to be her father - who House recognises from his days as a jazz musician. The medic does not believe the patient is his old friend's daughter, and wonders whether her apparent links to a famed pianist could provide a clue to her ailment. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron and David's plans are scuppered when Lisa reveals she is pregnant. David is despondent, but Paul has an idea that might lift his spirits(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean is pleased Ziggy is doing well but fears he may lose her. Lawyer Yvonne arrives to talk to Robbo and Jasmine about the forthcoming trial, but Robbo snaps and throws her out(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Immigrants who claim welfare to support children who live back in their home countries. Self-employed scrap-metal collector and father-of-three Ion came to the UK at the start of 2014 and estimates he gets £1,200 in benefits a month, and is spending virtually all of it renovating his family home back in rural Romania. Evita Kossmann lives in Warsaw and gets around £220 a month in British benefits for her 10-year-old son Mateusz because her husband Sebastian resides and works in Bristol(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Profile of a 67-year-old Somerset man who is hoping to get married for the ninth time, once his 27-year-old fiancee arrives from the Philippines. Ron believes that having Cristel around to care for him during in his old age will make him less of a burden on the state. Plus, a Lowestoft carer who looks after his wife hopes that moving into their first proper home together will bring them more happiness, and an out-of-work Liverpool man dreams of a life on the ocean waves(n)

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: Documentary following the hectic lives of two British families wrestling with the struggles and joys of raising 10 kids apiece(n)

programme.title: Bodylicious!
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Antonio, one of the most committed Michael Jackson devotees in the world, and Blondie, who has modelled her entire life on Barbie(n)

programme.title: Bodylicious!
programme.desc: In Atlanta, cameras focus on Asha, the proud owner of the world's longest dreadlocks, and in Miami, there is a look at twins Nadia and Dana, who have attracted a big following(n)

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea (1999)
programme.desc: A scientist researching Alzheimer's disease devises a way to enlarge the brains of killer sharks on an isolated research facility to help develop her theories. However, the experiments result in a marked increase in the creatures' intelligence, and before long they manage to escape their confinement - with bloody consequences. Thriller, starring Saffron Burrows, Thomas Jane, Stellan Skarsgard, LL Cool J and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica agrees to help a friend with a political campaign to become a senatorial candidate. When the publicity manager is murdered, she finds herself caught up in an intriguing murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica unwittingly gets involved in a contract killing, leading her to be accused of being the assassin and jailed. The incarcerated detective must rely on Grady and Michael to prove her innocence. With guest stars John Rhys-Davies and Michael Horton(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Trace of Murder (1997)
programme.desc: A conniving woman yearns to divorce her husband and set up home with her lover - but a pre-nuptial agreement means she stands to lose out. Instead, she devises a cunning plan to nullify the contract, framing her unsuspecting spouse for the murder of a business rival. However, she reckons without the shabby sleuth's unfailing ability to uncover the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Shera Danese, Barry Corbin and David Rasche(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Wheeler investigate when a popular online video blogger is apparently kidnapped during a live broadcast, but begin to doubt the crime really occurred. However, the case takes a strange turn when a ransom demand is made. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars, and veteran US news reporter Larry King appears as himself(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a baby at a grocery store leads the detectives to a shady racket that involves snatching infants and arranging to sell them for adoption. Unexpectedly, the investigation produces new leads on an old case involving a murdered mother and her missing child - which had been supervised by Cragen and his partner. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An HIV-positive man with a record of assaulting under-age girls is suspected of a series of rapes and murders - but Stabler's determination to charge him results in tragedy. Undeterred, the team pursues its new suspect, a rap promoter, though his cunning leaves little hope of a conviction. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former police officer turned community activist becomes the prime suspect for the detectives as they investigate the murders of two known sex offenders. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler try to solve the rape of a veteran police officer, but their efforts are thwarted by officers from the Department of Internal Affairs who seem determined to suppress evidence and bury the case. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A discrepancy at the murder scene of an 18-year-old woman implicates assistant district attorney Craig Hansen in a different crime. Stella interrupts a bail hearing to arrest him, but her intervention results in a suspected killer being released back onto the streets. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. A team-mate becomes the prime suspect, but further digging focuses attention on her problematic relationship with an ex-fiance, who reveals she had become obsessed with cosmetic procedures. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman confesses to murdering her husband, but the evidence clears her of any wrongdoing and raises several disturbing new lines of inquiry - including the possibility that a serial killer may be stalking the city. Elsewhere, Hawkes forces Danny to concentrate on his recovery, and Flack's behaviour is called into question. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Angie and Shade go undercover on the speed dating scene to catch a predatory identity thief(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The wife of a zealous defence lawyer is found dead in her car, but Briscoe and Green suspect the victim's husband was the real target, and set off on the trail of a former client - a convict who sent him threatening letters from jail. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a woman whose scantily clad body is found on the Upper East Side. Initially believing her to be a prostitute, they learn she was a doctor who had been handing out unauthorised doses of a powerful drug. The hunt for her killer leads the team into a web of deceit and blackmail, with a Russian mobster and his son seemingly pulling the strings(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a fundraising party, where she is soon called on to investigate the mystery of a priceless necklace stolen from a hotel room above her own. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's home town of Cabot Cove is thrust into the limelight by the discovery of two bodies buried in the Appletree sisters' yard. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury as a crime writer with a mystery-solving sideline(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The charred body of an Asian girl is found outside the apartment of the Chinese consul general. Forensics discover she was murdered before her corpse was burned, prompting detectives to investigate rumours that the diplomat is somehow connected. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A pregnant Muslim student is murdered, and initial inquiries suggest the crime was prompted by her efforts to break up a clash between two ethnic groups. However, Logan and Wheeler later learn the victim was secretly dating an Italian-American against the wishes of her parents, who had organised an arranged marriage - and as they investigate the animosity between the two families, more blood is shed(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and another officer team up to track down a serial killer, focusing their investigation on a recently released sex offender - but fresh evidence leads them to believe he may have been wrongly convicted. Concerned that a miscarriage of justice could have occurred, they look over old case files and turn their attention to the suspect's neighbour, a man with employment links in the vicinity of seven murders around the country. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and David Keith(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team races against time to find a girl's kidnapper, who appears to be a serial killer with a penchant for murdering his victims after three days. A promising lead is found by retracing an old case - but on arrival at the suspect's house, another body is discovered in the closet. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen and Stabler pull out all the stops as they search for the runaway daughter of an out-of-state police officer, enlisting an internet journalist's help to track the missing girl. Meanwhile, Internal Affairs begin an interrogation of the team members, to make sure they are doing things strictly by the book. Police drama, starring Christopher Meloni(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac's motor racing hero dies in an explosion during an exhibition event and investigations reveal someone had tampered with his car. Unfortunately, the detectives face an ever-increasing list of suspects as they discover conflicting evidence about who could have sabotaged it. Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. Mac pursues a lead suggesting the victim was killed by a rival artist - but Hawkes makes a breakthrough in the lab that indicates he was targeted by someone he should have been able to trust. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A simple surveillance case at a karaoke bar in Little Korea escalates to full danger, forcing Shade and Angie to call in familiar reinforcements for help(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Although the shootings appear random, Briscoe and Green suspect the deaths are linked and discover a connection between one of the victims and a former marine who is an expert shot with the rifle used in the crimes. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's idyllic winter weekend at a ski lodge takes a terrifying turn as her snowbound fellow guests are stalked by a fanatic with murder in mind. Angela Lansbury stars, with a guest appearance by Emma Samms(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica heads to West Virginia to come to the aid of one of her former students, who has been arrested for murder - but the unfriendly locals are less than happy about her investigation. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a hit-and-run driver, with tyre marks at the scene indicating it was deliberate. The case is complicated when the chief suspect is murdered by his mother. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: Once Shepherd convinces Keaton that Anna Cruz is an FBI mole working for Tal, Keaton and the team spy on one of their own, hoping Cruz will lead them to Tal(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a man is shot outside a gay club, the detectives' investigations lead to his family, where they discover the wife of the dead man has a turbulent past. Forensic testing connects the victim to the filming of a porn movie - but the team does not expect to find out his spouse is also involved in the industry. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team's search for a serial rapist leads to a suspect who as a child was the victim of the same type of crime at the hands of his father - prompting his lawyer to cite genetics as the reason for his actions. Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when a man is found badly beaten in a plush hotel. They discover he was working for a male escort service - and soon unearth a connection with three similar attacks. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to Crawley in West Sussex to help out a family-run concern just five miles away from Gatwick. Despite its proximity to the busy airport, the Waterhall Country House Hotel is struggling and owners Anne and Andy Marsh desperately need a change in fortunes if it is to become profitable. Can Alex set them on the way to success?(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Cirencester, Gloucestershire, to help the Beasleys finish work on an incomplete extension to their former council house. The project has taken a back seat to ill health and loss of work over the previous five years, leaving the family on the brink of despair, so local tradespeople, members of the community and designer Charlie Luxton are enlisted to help with the build(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of a Dartford woman who called a halt to renovation work on her post-war pre-fab home when her son was diagnosed with autistic spectrum disorder. The DIY expert enlists guest designer Oliver Heath and more than 100 local traders to add an extension, reconfigure the property's layout and transform the garden in a bid to help the pair move on with their lives(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Years of bad luck and illness have left the Wrights unable to finish converting their bungalow in Ottery St Mary, east Devon, into a four-bedroom family home. With this in mind, Nick Knowles enlists the aid of local tradespeople and guest designer Charlie Luxton to help them complete the project(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion set off on road trip to seek out bargains they hope will make a profit at auction. Armed with £200 each, they travel through Suffolk and Cambridgeshire before heading to their first auction in Market Harborough, Leicestershire(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique hunters Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw shop across Gloucestershire and Northamptonshire before going head to head at auction in Evesham, Worcestershire(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion auction their lots in Nantwich, Cheshire, with Paul uncovering a hidden gem that could help him win the day(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion's bargain-buying challenge takes them to Shropshire and Worcestershire, where highlights include Christina learning about the origins of the modern Olympic movement in Much Wenlock(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion take in the delights of Staffordshire and Cheshire for their last leg. Paul has enjoyed trememdous success at auction thus far, so Christina hopes to catch up as the pair head towards their final destination of Northwich(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties about to be auctioned, then follow the sale and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings. This episode features a derelict house in Surrey where the new owners plan to build four houses, a novice developer in Crewe, and a couple of seasoned property professionals in Cheshire(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a cottage in Cornwall, a property in Cumbria and a home in County Londonderry, Northern Ireland. They then find out what they were sold for at auction and speak to the new owners about their plans(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a bungalow, a terraced house and a unique water tower about to be auctioned in Gosforth in Newcastle, Maidstone in Kent and Northern Ireland's Newtownards. They speak to the new owners after the sales, then revisit the homes to see how the developers have progressed(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a large semi-detached home in Derbyshire, a four-bedroom terraced house in Belfast, and a modest one-bedroom flat in Clydebank, West Dunbartonshire. They then discover what they were sold for at auction and speak to the new owners about their plans(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Cameras follow mother and daughter Maxine and Jasmine as they face one of their biggest hoarder jobs yet - an elderly man who has a bungalow packed with 30 years' worth of belongings. Meanwhile, George and his team face a difficult clean up after a body was discovered in a flat(n)

programme.title: Call the Cleaners
programme.desc: Maxine and Jasmine help a man who is caring for his elderly father, with the family home featuring kitchen floorboards that have years' worth of dirt ingrained and carpets that are threadbare and filthy. Yvonne and Angela have their work cut out with the worst toilet they have ever encountered in a one-day clean of a caravan(n)

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper

programme.desc: McGarrett and the gang have a busy Halloween trying to track down a copycat killer who has taken inspiration from a cult slasher film featuring a sickle-armed psycho with a penchant for pumpkin heads. Jerry isn't having too great a time of it either, as he gets on the wrong side of the counterfeiters he's been following(n)

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Documentary series taking viewers inside the UK Border Agency, revealing the work that takes place behind the scenes of the immigration process. Teams at Heathrow Terminal 3, Calais, Dover and across the North West and North East of England reveal the methods and technology used to allow legitimate visitors safe passage while catching those who try to gain illegal entry to the UK(n)

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A man returning from Vietnam has something in his bag that he doesn't want his mother to see, while an emotional American woman says she is visiting Australia to tie up some loose ends from a failed relationship - but a mystery man arrives and turns her story upside down. Two Chinese visitors squabble among themselves when officers discover prohibited items in their bags, and things get messy when searching a large container(n)

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A woman returning from a trip to China has a tantrum, and officers want to know why she has business cards for a Sydney brothel and passports for three unknown Chinese women. An elderly New Zealander says he has turned over a new leaf, but his track record may stop him from attending an important family event(n)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

Jonny Lee Miller and Lucy Liu star(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks through the haunted Coombs Dale in the Peak District and to Glenridding Dodd in the Lake District(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks around the Muirtown Basin in Inverness and Hugh Town on the Isles of Scilly(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White and his team explore the British Isles, beginning with a challenging hike up Silver How in the Lake District and a walk through Fishlake in South Yorkshire(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks through Silverdale Glen on the Isle of Man and takes a winter trek around Elter Water in the Lake District(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Hitler's deputy, Rudolf Hess, the third in line to leadership of Nazi Germany, who was declared insane by the Fuehrer after making an unexpected errand of peace to Britain in 1941. The senior Nazi's fitness to stand trial was at the centre of his case in the tribunal. Narrated by Matthew MacFadyen and starring Ben Cross as Hess(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams reveals how as Hitler's plans to invade Britain took shape, members of Churchill's Resistance Movement got ready to defend the nation, consulting their specially-prepared instruction manuals on explosives and killing techniques(n)

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves(n)

programme.title: Rockets in the Dunes (1960)
programme.desc: A Devon beach is used by local children for racing sand yachts, but their fun may be at an end when the army plan to use the dunes as a training ground. The youngsters rally the local community to save their beach, but the discovery of disused mines complicates things further. Family drama, starring Richard Adam and Fiona Davie(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Exploring the districts of Woolwich, Plumstead and Deptford(n)

programme.title: May to December
programme.desc: Alec agrees to give Zoe driving lessons, but it soon puts pressure on their relationship(n)

programme.title: May to December
programme.desc: Zoe is not seeing as much of Alec as she would like, so she suggests that he move in with her(n)

programme.title: The Traitors (1962)
programme.desc: British and American secret agents join forces to unmask Communist spies plotting to steal top secret plans. Thriller, starring Patrick Allen and Jacqueline Ellis(n)

programme.title: Just My Luck (1957)
programme.desc: A jeweler's assistant places a bet on the horses in a desperate attempt to raise enough ready cash to buy the girl of his dreams a suitably impressive present. However, the gamble quickly leads to some very tricky situations. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Leslie Phillips, Jill Dixon, Margaret Rutherford and Joan Sims(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad(n)

programme.title: Anthea Turner's Hot Topics
programme.desc: Anthea Turner puts some of the capital's amazing young musicians into the spotlight to be assessed by professionals(n)

programme.title: London Live Book Club
programme.desc: Not sure what to read next? We offer inspiration as we chat to London-based writers, and those who feature the capital in their works(n)

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene(n)

programme.title: Iranian Embassy Siege
programme.desc: Interviews with those involved in the 1980 Iranian Embassy Siege and footage of the dramatic SAS operation that brought it to an end(n)

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young(n)

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes(n)

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire(n)

programme.title: Anchoress (1993)
programme.desc: A peasant girl develops a fascination with a statue of the Virgin Mary, which prompts a priest to sentence her to be walled up in the church. When she discovers her mother is to be tried as a witch, she resolves to break free from her imprisonment, even if it costs her her life. Medieval drama, starring Natalie Morse, Toyah Willcox, Pete Postlethwaite and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay(n)

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days(n)

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: A chance to catch up on debates about the issues behind the headlines(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kim is brainwashed into liking hip hop, and the other girls are forced to change their music to accommodate her new obsession(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls take on the Mixed Tapes on a game show, but their rivals cheat by exploiting their worst fears(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre leaves the crew after an argument with Tjure, and becomes king of a land where everyone speaks with a lisp(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: RT Documentaries
programme.desc: Front Running dives deep into the issues driving the race for the Democratic Party presidential nomination, and looks at the radical new economic ideas being offered in order to attract the new largest voting block in America - the Millenials.(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
